grants_actions.name: Elemental Disciplines
grants_actions.summary: Spend focus on elemental techniques that can blast, shape space, or solve traversal problems.

features.safe_summary: Spend focus on elemental techniques that can blast, shape space, or solve traversal problems.
features.rules_summary: Spend focus on elemental techniques that can blast, shape space, or solve traversal problems.

features.name: Elemental Flow

grants_actions.name: Elemental Flow
grants_actions.summary: Your mastery over the elements starts blending mobility, area control, and rhythm into a smoother combat pattern.

features.safe_summary: Your mastery over the elements starts blending mobility, area control, and rhythm into a smoother combat pattern.
features.rules_summary: Your mastery over the elements starts blending mobility, area control, and rhythm into a smoother combat pattern.

features.name: Avatar of the Four Winds

grants_actions.name: Avatar of the Four Winds
grants_actions.summary: At the height of the path, you become a major elemental presence rather than a martial artist with a few themed tricks.

features.safe_summary: At the height of the path, you become a major elemental presence rather than a martial artist with a few themed tricks.
features.rules_summary: At the height of the path, you become a major elemental presence rather than a martial artist with a few themed tricks.

features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.trigger: When your Flurry of Blows hits.

grants_actions.name: Open Hand Technique
grants_actions.summary: Your Flurry of Blows can impose rider effects (push, prone, or reaction denial), turning strikes into battlefield control.

features.safe_summary: Your Flurry of Blows can impose rider effects (push, prone, or reaction denial), turning strikes into battlefield control.
features.rules_summary: Your Flurry of Blows can impose rider effects (push, prone, or reaction denial), turning strikes into battlefield control.

features.name: Wholeness of Body

grants_actions.name: Wholeness of Body
grants_actions.summary: Use disciplined breathing and inner focus to restore your own vitality mid-adventure or mid-fight.

features.safe_summary: Use disciplined breathing and inner focus to restore your own vitality mid-adventure or mid-fight.
features.rules_summary: Use disciplined breathing and inner focus to restore your own vitality mid-adventure or mid-fight.

features.name: Tranquility
features.duration: Until broken or as defined by table rules.
features.safe_summary: Your centered presence discourages violence until enemies deliberately break the peace around you.
features.rules_summary: Your centered presence discourages violence until enemies deliberately break the peace around you.

features.name: Quivering Palm
features.trigger: After hitting with an unarmed strike; later triggered with an action.

grants_actions.name: Quivering Palm
grants_actions.summary: Plant a hidden lethal vibration in a target and trigger it later for a terrifying finishing burst.

features.safe_summary: Plant a hidden lethal vibration in a target and trigger it later for a terrifying finishing burst.
features.rules_summary: Plant a hidden lethal vibration in a target and trigger it later for a terrifying finishing burst.

features.name: wild-magic-surge
features.safe_summary: Unstable magic erupts around your spells, making every big cast feel thrilling and slightly dangerous.
features.rules_summary: Unstable magic erupts around your spells, making every big cast feel thrilling and slightly dangerous.

features.name: wild-tides-of-chaos
features.recovery: Recharges when surge energy is released; otherwise long rest at DM discretion.
features.safe_summary: Bend fate toward success now, knowing the chaos may answer back later.
features.rules_summary: Bend fate toward success now, knowing the chaos may answer back later.

features.name: wild-bend-luck
features.recovery: Uses Sorcery Points, which refresh on a long rest.

grants_actions.name: wild-bend-luck
grants_actions.summary: Spend sorcery to skew another creature’s roll at the last second.

features.safe_summary: Spend sorcery to skew another creature’s roll at the last second.
features.rules_summary: Spend sorcery to skew another creature’s roll at the last second.

features.name: wild-controlled-chaos
features.safe_summary: When surges trigger, roll twice and choose the result so chaos becomes partially directed.
features.rules_summary: When surges trigger, roll twice and choose the result so chaos becomes partially directed.

features.name: wild-spell-bombardment
features.safe_summary: When your spell hits hard, unstable force can cascade into even more punishment.
features.rules_summary: When your spell hits hard, unstable force can cascade into even more punishment.

features.name: Vitality of the Tree
features.trigger: When your Rage starts
features.safe_summary: The World Tree path makes your barbarian feel rooted, sustaining, and difficult to wear down.
features.rules_summary: The World Tree path makes your barbarian feel rooted, sustaining, and difficult to wear down.

features.name: Branches of the Tree
features.trigger: When a creature misses you with an attack while you are raging

grants_actions.name: Branches of the Tree
grants_actions.summary: You project World Tree influence outward to reposition, support, or control the shape of the fight.

features.safe_summary: You project World Tree influence outward to reposition, support, or control the shape of the fight.
features.rules_summary: You project World Tree influence outward to reposition, support, or control the shape of the fight.

features.name: Battering Roots
features.trigger: While raging
features.safe_summary: Your World Tree power turns movement and impact into a heavier form of battlefield disruption.
features.rules_summary: Your World Tree power turns movement and impact into a heavier form of battlefield disruption.

features.name: Travel Along the Tree
features.trigger: While raging
features.recovery: Regain use on a Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: Travel Along the Tree
grants_actions.summary: You gain a high-tier movement trick that makes the World Tree path feel mythic instead of merely tough.

features.safe_summary: You gain a high-tier movement trick that makes the World Tree path feel mythic instead of merely tough.
features.rules_summary: You gain a high-tier movement trick that makes the World Tree path feel mythic instead of merely tough.
